coordinate_changes.description: Hydrogen atom 14 transfers from benzoxazole alpha carbon 13 to Barton's-base nitrogen 23.

electronic_state.proposal_basis: Neutral even-electron component inventory and the user-selected closed-shell main-group test scope; this is not source-reported input metadata.

expected_result.barrier_reference_status: value reported by the SI; exact common energy-zero definition requires review before quantitative reproduction claims
expected_result.expected_mode_description: The reviewed imaginary mode must move H14 along the C13-H14-N23 proton-transfer coordinate.

geometry.extraction_review: Recovered from the right-hand SI coordinate column and cross-checked against the S76 structure, formula, atom count, and 1.43/1.28 angstrom proton-transfer distances.

citation.title: Borane-Catalyzed Enantioselective alpha-Alkylation of Unactivated 2-Alkylbenzoxazoles with Electron-Deficient Olefins

deferred_benchmarks.reason: Comparable in size to the previously rejected 89-atom first test; retained only as a later full-BCF benchmark.
The full BCF C-C-forming transition state is larger than the BF3 topology pair and is not part of the initial live sequence.

reported_protocol.irc_statement: The SI states that IRC calculations were conducted to determine connectivity of minima and transition states.
